title: Drawer
description: Drawer component is a sliding panel that emerges from the side of the screen, offering additional content or navigation options without occupying permanent space. It is ideal for menus, settings, or supplementary information, and can be easily toggled open or closed by the user.

sections.title: Location
sections.description: You can change location of ax-drawer with location property

sections.title: Mode
sections.description: You can change mode of ax-drawer with mode property

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: showBackdrop
props.description: Show a backdrop behind the drawer.

props.name: closeOnBackdropClick
props.description: Close drawer when backdrop is clicked.

props.name: backdropClass
props.description: CSS class for the backdrop styling.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onBackdropClick
events.description: Emitted when the backdrop is clicked.

events.name: collapsedStateChanged
events.description: Emitted when the collapsed state changes.

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

/**
 * Opens the drawer.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. The drawer is expanded.
 */
open(): void

/**
 * Closes the drawer.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. The drawer is collapsed.
 */
close(): void

/**
 * Toggles the drawer state between open and closed.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. The drawer state is toggled.
 */
toggle(): void
